chapter_title.ar: بَابُ كِفَايَةِ الْعِيَالِ وَ التَّوَسُّعِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Adequacy for the dependants and extending upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/138)
text: سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَنْقُصَ مِنْ قُوتِ عِيَالِهِ فِي الشِّتَاءِ وَ يَزِيدَ فِي وَقُودِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Yasser Al Khadim who said,
‘I heard Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘It is befitting for the Believer that he reduces from the provision of his dependants during the winter and increases in their fuel (for heating expenses)’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Yasir al-Khadim who has said the following: “I heard abu al-Hassan al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘A man should spare from the means of his sustenance to provide fuel for his family during winter.’”
